title: Menorca Half Marathon
description: The island's only half marathon covers 21.097 km through the cobbled streets, squares and palaces of Ciutadella's old town, starting from the Plaça d'es Born. The twenty-sixth edition takes place on 1 November 2026, starting at 9.30am from the Plaça des Born, and also features a 10 km race and a fun run on the same day.
